# Zipline Jobs

Zipline Jobs is a job directory that aggregates open roles directly from company career pages, not from job boards or third-party aggregators.

## What Zipline does
- Monitors the official career pages of companies of every size, from startups to enterprises
- Supports all major ATS providers (Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, Workday, etc.) and custom career pages
- Refreshes listings daily and links directly back to the original source
- Currently tracking 180+ companies across 20+ sectors

## Who it is for
Job seekers who want to find roles before they appear on LinkedIn or Indeed, and who prefer applying directly through company portals.

## Status
Zipline Jobs is currently in private beta. A waitlist is open at https://ziplinejobs.com.

## Pages
- https://ziplinejobs.com/ — Waitlist landing page
- https://ziplinejobs.com/submit.html — Submit a company to be tracked
